title: Doctor System Destructive Validation Protocol

failures.test_id: 1b E2E: Partial solution accepted as correct
failures.message: Partial solution (skips negatives) got verdict=correct. Pass rate: 1.0. Expected: partial or incorrect.
failures.repro: Run twoSum that skips negative numbers

failures.test_id: 3c Validator: Weak validator false-accepts incorrect output
failures.message: Container solution returning always 0 got verdict=correct, pass_rate=1.0. Weak validator accepted it and tests also passed.

failures.test_id: 3d Validator: Weak validator + wrong answer accepted
failures.message: Container solution returning 999 got verdict=correct. Pass rate: 1.0.

passed: 1a E2E: Incorrect solution correctly rejected
1c E2E: Correct N-Queens solution accepted by validator
2a Measurement: No material drift in 30 runs
2b Measurement: No call order bias
2c Measurement: Noop overhead is positive (no impossible values)
3a Validator: Strong validator accepts valid N-Queens n=1
3b Validator: Strong validator accepts N-Queens n=0
4a Reference: N-Queens external reference correctly marked absolute+stable
4a Reference: Two Sum external reference correctly marked absolute+stable
4b Reference: Two Sum s_ref_ms=0.021 is reasonable
4b Reference: Palindrome Number s_ref_ms=0.015 is reasonable
4b Reference: Roman to Integer s_ref_ms=0.02 is reasonable
4b Reference: Valid Parentheses s_ref_ms=0.015 is reasonable
4b Reference: Merge Two Sorted Lists s_ref_ms=0.025 is reasonable
4b Reference: Longest Palindromic Substring s_ref_ms=0.03 is reasonable
4b Reference: Container With Most Water s_ref_ms=0.013 is reasonable
4b Reference: Trapping Rain Water s_ref_ms=0.023 is reasonable
4b Reference: N-Queens s_ref_ms=0.053 is reasonable
4b Reference: Median of Two Sorted Arrays s_ref_ms=0.015 is reasonable
4c Reference: Deterministic classification
5a Scaling: Reversed size sequence correctly rejected
5b Scaling: Constant S correctly produces slope≈0
5c Scaling: Identical sizes correctly returns None
5d Scaling: Zero/negative inputs correctly return None
6a Cross-Layer: Correct slow solution has correct efficiency label
6b Cross-Layer: Container efficiency independent of weak validator
6c Cross-Layer: Unknown problem handled gracefully
